title: Hot Beef Stock Pancakes
description: A sweet and crunchy brunch dish featuring hot beef stock, jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: Sweetener (optional, for a touch of sweetness)

instructions: Combine beef stock and water in a pressure cooker. Bring to a simmer.
Whisk tapioca flour with a few drops of sweetener until smooth. Pour into the boiling mixture, stirring continuously.
Simmer for about 10 minutes or until thickened.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Pour batter onto hot skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Cook pancakes in batches until golden brown on both sides.
